since_last: 79% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 79% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.11% · BTC +1.35% · Gold -1.06% · Nasdaq100 +2.12%. 79% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.52%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.52%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -48.95%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +11.95%, AMAT +11.44%, LRCX +8.85%, PANW +8.01%, TSLA +7.67%. Laggards: HON -48.95%, SMCI -7.74%, DLR -1.80%, SOUN -1.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.38% at $159.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
